name: Kilo Code

form_factor.comment: VS Code extension, JetBrains plugin, CLI, Cloud Agents. OpenCode fork; programmatic control via @opencode-ai/sdk against the Kilo/OpenCode server. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://kilo.ai/docs/code-with-ai/platforms/cli; Extension: https://kilo.ai/docs/code-with-ai/platforms/vscode.

released_in.comment: Repository created 2025-03-10. First stable public release effectively Feb 2026 (v1.0.25). v7 rewrite announced May 2026.

latest_major_update.comment: Latest release checked: v7.3.46 (June 15, 2026). Release notes include model-specific reasoning overrides for task/custom subagents, custom provider reasoning cleanup, permission prompt clarifications, session redo fixes, and worktree question routing.

rules.comment: Full support: Project Rules (via instructions key in kilo.jsonc), Global Rules (same in ~/.config/kilo/kilo.jsonc), AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, CONTEXT.md. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

skills.comment: Full Agent Skills standard. SKILL.md files with YAML frontmatter. Global ~/.kilo/skills/, project .kilo/skills/. Compat with .claude/skills/, .agents/skills/. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

hooks.comment: Full support via Plugin system. Lifecycle hooks: config, event (bus events), tool hooks (execute.before/after), chat hooks, permission hooks, provider hooks. 17+ hook types.

mcp_servers.comment: Full MCP support. Local (STDIO) and remote (HTTP Streamable) transports. OAuth 2.0. Tool permissions via allow/ask/deny. Built-in Playwright MCP. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

custom_commands.comment: Full support via Workflows (slash commands). Markdown files in ~/.config/kilo/commands/ or .kilo/commands/. YAML frontmatter with description, agent, model. Location: no public disk folder/file location found in docs reviewed.

goal_command.comment: Kilo Code uses custom workflows/slash commands; no first-party `/goal` for persistent session objectives.

subagents.comment: Full subagent support. Custom modes/agents with mode property: primary, subagent, or all. Per-agent prompts, models, permissions, temperature. task tool spawns sub-agents.

model_selection.comment: 500+ models via 15+ providers. Switch mid-session with /models. Per-agent model pinning. CLI flags: -m, --model. Auto model routing.

approval_mode.comment: Three-tier: allow (auto-approve), ask (prompt), deny (block). Glob patterns. --auto flag for autonomous mode. Per-agent permission overrides.

sandbox_mode.comment: No dedicated Docker/sandbox isolation. External_directory permissions control reads/writes outside workspace. Permission system with allow/deny/ask.

resume.comment: Session continuation via --continue/-c flag. -s, --session <id> for specific sessions. --fork to fork existing sessions. /sessions slash command.

continue.comment: --continue/-c flag on kilo, kilo run, and kilo attach commands. /sessions slash command also accepts /continue alias.

non_interactive.comment: Multiple non-interactive modes: kilo run <message> (one-shot), --auto flag (fully autonomous), --json (JSON output), --json-io (bidirectional JSON). kilo serve for headless server.

output_format.comment: --format flag with choices default (TUI) and json (raw JSON events). --json flag implies auto mode. --json-io for bidirectional JSON. Session export/import.

statusline.comment: No customizable statusline feature found. Has /status slash command and /themes for theming, but no persistent status line customization.

telemetry.comment: Enabled by default. Disable via experimental.openTelemetry: false. OpenTelemetry export when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set.

custom_model_provider.comment: BYOK for 15+ providers. Plugin system for entirely custom providers. Local models supported. 500+ models via Kilo Gateway at zero markup.

notes: Kilo Code is a rapidly evolving open-source coding agent (MIT, 19k+ stars). Originally forked from Continue, now independent. Notable for extensive plugin system, 500+ model support through Kilo Gateway, and cross-surface session sync.

pricing.comment: App is free & MIT. Kilo Pass (Starter $19/mo, Pro $49/mo, Expert $199/mo). BYOK (no markup). Free models. Teams: $15/user/mo.

some_free_usage.comment: Kilo Code documents free/open-source access plus Auto Free/BYOK/local inference options.

no_account_required.comment: Can run local models via Ollama, LM Studio, or Atomic Chat without a Kilo-hosted account.

can_use_other_subscriptions.comment: Kilo documents use of an existing ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription and BYOK/local provider options.

hosted_agent.comment: Cloud Agents feature allows web-based sessions; primary use is local via extension/CLI.

transcripts.comment: Location: transcript/session disk storage was not found in public docs reviewed.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
